---
title: "Éducation thérapeutique"
---


### OncoNormandie {#onconormandie .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.onconormandie.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/onconormandie.png" alt="OncoNormandie">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.onconormandie.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">OncoNormandie</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Réseau régional de cancérologie de Normandie
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### ZEPHIR {#zephir-splf .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://splf.fr/videos-zephir/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/zephir.png" alt="ZEPHIR">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://splf.fr/videos-zephir/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">ZEPHIR</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société de Pneumologie de Langue Française (SPLF)
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Forminhal {#forminhal .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://forminhal.formedoc.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/forminhal.png" alt="Forminhal">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://forminhal.formedoc.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Forminhal</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Formedoc
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Prevenclic {#prevenclic .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://prevenclic.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/prevenclic.png" alt="Prevenclic">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://prevenclic.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Prevenclic</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Formedoc
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
